body: Elevation describes the z-axis relationship between UI surfaces. HDS has no shadow tokens - depth is established through two mechanisms: surface fill progression (three background tiers with stepped lightness) and motion (surfaces that emerge animate into position).

surfaceTiers.label: Page
surfaceTiers.use: Base canvas. All content sits on this layer. Nothing is lower.

surfaceTiers.label: Raised
surfaceTiers.use: Cards, sidebars, nav backgrounds. One step above the page.

surfaceTiers.label: Overlay
surfaceTiers.use: Dropdown menus, popover panels, inline editors. Top of the fill ladder.

rules.rule: Do not use box-shadow for elevation. Shadow tokens were intentionally removed - depth is expressed through surface fill and motion only.
Use exactly three surface levels in the fill ladder: primary (page), secondary (raised), tertiary (overlay). Do not create intermediate levels.
When adjacent surfaces share a fill too similar to distinguish (especially in dark mode), a border stroke draws the edge instead of shadow.
Surfaces that emerge from behind other surfaces must animate (y: 8->0, opacity fade-in). This establishes z-order through behavior, not a persistent visual artifact.
rules.valid: initial={{ y: 8, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
rules.invalid: // rendering a dropdown without entrance animation

usage.condition: Distinguishing adjacent surfaces of similar lightness
Surface entering from behind (dropdown, modal, drawer open)
usage.apply: initial={{ y: 8, opacity: 0 }} animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }} + semantic.motion.productive

avoid: Using box-shadow for any elevation purpose - it degrades in dark mode and adds visual noise.
Inventing intermediate surface tiers (e.g. rgba overlays at 1%-3%) outside the three-tier system.
Using drop-shadow CSS filter as a substitute for box-shadow.
Rendering dropdowns or modals without an entrance animation - z-order must be communicated through motion.

examples.name: CARD - raised surface with edge border
DROPDOWN - overlay surface with entrance animation
examples.code:
<motion.div
  initial={{ y: 8, opacity: 0 }}
  animate={{ y: 0, opacity: 1 }}
  transition={{ duration: hds.motion.productive.duration, ease: hds.motion.productive.easing }}
  style={{
    background:  'var(--semantic-color-surface-overlay)',
    border:      `${hds.borderWidth.default} solid var(--semantic-color-border-default)`,
    position:    'absolute',
  }}
/>
